name: Chicken: Citrus Sage Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry. Place them in a shallow baking dish.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients in a bowl.
4. Pour half of the mixture over the chicken breasts.
5. Bake for 20 minutes longer or until cooked through.
Yield: 8 servings.
